name: Oatmeal Choco Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Beat together margarine and sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg and vanilla; beat until well combined.
4. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt (if using).
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the margarine mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in oats, chocolate pieces, and nuts.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes.
9. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire rack.
